reviews.comment:
Lamentablemente cada vez que hay promociónes no puesde ser que solo haya dos surtidores habilitados y una cola de mas de 10 autos esperando. No es un buen trato para el socio del ACA que paga una cuota todos los meses.

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, every time there are promotions, it's unacceptable that there are only two pumps open and a line of more than 10 cars waiting. It's not fair to treat ACA members who pay their dues every month.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtaElDekd3EAE
